name: Tape End
description: Analog tape running out with warm flutter and stop

prompts.label: analog tape reaching end with warm flutter and stop
prompts.text: analog tape reaching end with warm flutter and stop, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: cassette mechanism clicking to halt with tape hiss fade
prompts.text: cassette mechanism clicking to halt with tape hiss fade, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: reel-to-reel slowing with wobbling pitch descent
prompts.text: reel-to-reel slowing with wobbling pitch descent, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: magnetic oxide whisper trailing into leader silence
prompts.text: magnetic oxide whisper trailing into leader silence, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: vintage deck motor winding down with warm saturation
prompts.text: vintage deck motor winding down with warm saturation, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
